description: DCGM Exporter metrics with time-sliced (vGPU) deduplication, pod/container attribution, and NVENC/NVDEC video engine utilization.

panels.description: Number of physical GPUs matching the host/gpu filters (deduped across vgpu slots).
panels.title: Physical GPUs

panels.description: Number of currently-allocated time-share (vGPU) slots across selected GPUs.

targets.expr: count(group by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", pod!=""}))

panels.title: Allocated vGPU Slots

panels.description: Distinct pods currently holding a vGPU slot.

targets.expr: count(group by (namespace, pod) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""}))

panels.title: Pods Using GPU

panels.description: Average GPU temperature across selected physical GPUs.
panels.title: Avg GPU Temperature

panels.description: Total power draw across selected physical GPUs (deduped across vgpu slots).
panels.title: Total Power

panels.description: GPU energy consumed in the last 1h and 24h (deduped across vgpu slots).
panels.title: Energy (1h / 24h)

panels.description: Pods currently holding a vGPU time-slice. The metric columns reflect the underlying physical GPU's state (shared across all pods on that GPU). Multiple queries are merged by their shared labels so each row is one (Host, GPU, vGPU, Pod, Container).

targets.expr: max by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu, modelName, namespace, pod, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""})

max by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu, modelName, namespace, pod, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""}) / on(Hostname, gpu) group_left() count by (Hostname, gpu) (group by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", pod!=""}))
max by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu, modelName, namespace, pod, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""})
max by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu, modelName, namespace, pod, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""})
max by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu, modelName, namespace, pod, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_DEC_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""})
max by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu, modelName, namespace, pod, container) (DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""})

panels.title: Active GPU Allocations (per pod / vGPU slot)

panels.description: Top consuming pods by fair-share GPU utilization (device utilization divided by number of co-tenant slots).

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (namespace, pod, container, Hostname, gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""}) / on(Hostname, gpu) group_left() count by (Hostname, gpu) (group by (Hostname, gpu, vgpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", pod!=""})))

panels.title: Top Pods — Fair-share GPU Utilization

panels.description: GPU memory occupancy by pod. Note: framebuffer is reported per device, not per process — pods sharing a GPU see identical values, so this view tells you which pods are co-resident on memory-heavy GPUs.

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (namespace, pod, container, Hostname, gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""}))

panels.title: Top Pods — Co-resident GPU Memory

panels.description: Per-pod GPU utilization over time. Each series represents the GPU device load while the pod held a time-slice; pods sharing a GPU will overlap.

targets.expr: max by (namespace, pod, container, Hostname, gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""})

panels.title: GPU Utilization by Pod (device-level, co-tenants overlap)

panels.description: SM utilization per physical GPU (deduped across vgpu slots).
panels.title: GPU Utilization

panels.description: Tensor (HMMA) pipe active ratio per physical GPU.
panels.title: Tensor Core Activity

panels.description: Graphics engine active ratio (covers graphics + compute pipelines).
panels.title: Graphics Engine Active

panels.description: Device memory interface active ratio (DRAM bandwidth pressure).
panels.title: DRAM Active

panels.description: Framebuffer memory used per physical GPU (deduped across vgpu slots).
panels.title: Framebuffer Used

panels.description: Framebuffer usage as a percentage of installed memory.

targets.expr: max by (Hostname, gpu, modelName) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu"}) / (max by (Hostname, gpu, modelName) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu"}) + max by (Hostname, gpu, modelName) (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu"}))

panels.title: Framebuffer Used %

panels.description: Memory copy engine utilization — useful for spotting DMA-bound workloads.
panels.title: Memory Copy Utilization

panels.description: NVENC (video encoder) utilization per physical GPU, expressed as a percentage. Source: DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL. This is the legacy NVML-based field — DCGM does not expose a per-engine NVENC profile counter, so this remains the only encoder signal available.
panels.title: NVENC Encoder Utilization

panels.description: NVDEC (video decoder) utilization per physical GPU, expressed as a percentage. Source: DCGM_FI_DEV_DEC_UTIL.
panels.title: NVDEC Decoder Utilization

panels.description: Pods sharing a GPU whose NVENC is currently active (>0%). Encoder utilization is device-level, so all co-tenants surface — useful for narrowing down which workloads might be transcoding.

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (namespace, pod, container, Hostname, gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_ENC_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""}) > 0)

panels.title: Pods on GPUs with Active NVENC

panels.description: Pods sharing a GPU whose NVDEC is currently active (>0%).

targets.expr: topk(10, max by (namespace, pod, container, Hostname, gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_DEC_UTIL{Hostname=~"$host", gpu=~"$gpu", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", pod!=""}) > 0)

panels.title: Pods on GPUs with Active NVDEC

panels.description: Power draw per physical GPU (deduped across vgpu slots).
panels.title: GPU Power Draw

panels.description: GPU temperature.
panels.title: GPU Temperature

panels.description: Memory die temperature where available (HBM/GDDR).
panels.title: Memory Temperature

panels.description: PCIe transmit and receive throughput per physical GPU.
panels.title: PCIe Throughput

panels.description: PCIe replay errors — any sustained non-zero rate suggests a flaky link or cabling issue.
panels.title: PCIe Replay Errors (5m)

panels.description: Streaming Multiprocessor clock.
panels.title: SM Clock

panels.description: Memory clock.
panels.title: Memory Clock

panels.description: Counters that should normally stay at zero. Any non-zero value here is a strong signal of GPU memory degradation.
panels.title: Reliability Counters

title: Better NVIDIA DCGM Dashboard
